principles.title: Productive
principles.body: Quick, legible motion for small UI changes.
principles.description: Use for buttons, inputs, toggles, tooltips, popovers, and subtle state changes.

principles.title: Expressive
principles.body: A little extra room for teaching moments and major entries.
principles.description: Use for modals, drawers, dialogs, onboarding, and emphasized surface arrivals.

principles.title: Spatial
principles.body: Movement that follows the layout across the viewport.
principles.description: Use for page transitions and broad layout travel.

principles.title: Exit
principles.body: Removal should feel calm and quick.
principles.description: Use for dismissals, toasts, and DOM removal.

durationSteps.description: Small UI motion like hover and feedback.
Longer layout travel across the viewport.

easingCurves.label: Emphasized
easingCurves.description: Balanced timing for general UI motion.

easingCurves.label: Decelerate
easingCurves.description: Starts quick, then settles into place.

easingCurves.label: Elastic
easingCurves.description: Bouncy motion with a small overshoot and return.

uiSamples.title: Button feedback
uiSamples.body: Hover and active states stay productively timed with no deformation.

uiSamples.title: Tooltip reveal
uiSamples.body: Tooltips and popovers enter cleanly with a small y-offset and opacity only.

uiSamples.title: Dialog reveal
uiSamples.body: Important surfaces can use the expressive token when the entry should feel more deliberate.

uiSamples.title: Page transition
uiSamples.body: Full-page movement stays spatial so the screen change feels grounded in the layout.
